title: Deep Sky Sells 10,000 Carbon Removal Credits To Microsoft And Royal Bank Of Canada
content: Royal Bank of Canada and Microsoft join forces with Canadian innovator Deep Sky to tackle climate change head-on, by inking a deal for the sale of 10,000 carbon removal credits. Deep Sky Labs, a first-of-its-kind facility in Canada, becomes the central platform for accelerating the development of cost-effective and scalable Direct Air Capture (DAC) technologies.
author: Analysts Account
